ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the course in weeks */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class session */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the class belongs to */,
  "class_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class type */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic covered */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading assigned */,
  "milestones" TEXT /* Milestones reached in the class */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the class was held */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the class */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the class */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_class_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_type_id") REFERENCES class_types ("class_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES readings ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_types" (
  "class_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class type */,
  "class_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the class type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the reading is assigned to */,
  "reading_material" TEXT /* Reading material assigned (e.g., Chapter 1) */,
  "reading_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "dropout_date" TEXT /* Date the student dropped the course (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assingments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who submitted the assignment */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the assignment was assigned to */,
  "assignment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assignment */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade received for the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assingments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assingments_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_management" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., instructor, student, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_management_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the notification is related to */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_management ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_completion" (
  "completion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each completion record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who completed the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course that was completed */,
  "completion_status" TEXT /* Status of the course completion (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the course was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("completion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_completion_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_completion_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being analyzed */,
  "engagement_metric" REAL /* Engagement metric (e.g., number of assignments submitted, discussion posts) */,
  "effectiveness_metric" REAL /* Effectiveness metric (e.g., student grades, course completion rates) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the analytics were recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
